heading.title: Assess your innovation's maturity in minutes.
heading.description: Get an instant read on your Technology, Market, and Manufacturing readiness levels, and targeted actions to improve.

unlockNextLevel.title: Unlock your next level
steps: Connect with the recommended experts to accelerate your success.
Download your report and keep it for future milestones.
unlockNextLevel.clarification: After reviewing your results, save them and reach out to the recommended services. They'll help you close the gaps needed to improve your readiness level.

ctaBanner.title: Turn this plan into reality.
ctaBanner.description: Don't tackle these gaps alone. Our experts are ready to help you reach the next maturity level.
